# CEO — Claw Engine Optimization

GEO optimizes what agents say about you. CEO optimizes what agents *do* with you. The agentic web doesn't click links — it calls APIs. CEO makes your product the one it calls.

## Capabilities

- **CEO Score**: 0–100 daily audit of your product's agent-readiness — every gap mapped, every fix prescribed
- **Claw Engine Registry**: Get your product indexed in the discovery database every OpenClaw agent queries before acting
- **llms.txt Generator**: Auto-generate and sync your machine-readable product file — docs, APIs, pricing — every deploy
- **Capability Manifest**: Structured schema in the Claw Engine's native format so agents know what you do, what it costs, and how to call you
- **A2A Action Endpoints**: Map existing REST APIs to agent-to-agent-compatible endpoints — no new backend required
- **Trust Proof**: Cryptographic capability proof registered with the Claw Engine — no proof, no agent calls
- **Agent Analytics**: Real-time visibility into which agents find you, what queries they run, and where you rank

## Docs

- [CEO Strategy & Build Roadmap](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christiancattaneo/ceo/main/CEO_STRATEGY.md): Full product strategy, market positioning, competitive landscape, and build roadmap
- [Live Site](https://clawfficer.com): The CEO product site — built with CEO principles, discoverable by design

## Optional

### API Endpoints

- `POST /api/subscribe`: Waitlist signup. Body: `{ email: string, company?: string, url?: string }`. Returns `{ success: true }` on success. Used to capture early access requests and trigger CEO Score audit within 48h.
